disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe bilateral ocular burning/foreign-body sensation and xerostomia with diffuse arthralgia
trigger_question_examples: What are your eyes and mouth like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both eyes burn like broken glass, my mouth is bone dry, and my hands and knees ache.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden vision loss; both eyes equally affected (not a single severe painful photophobic eye) (keratitis/ulcer screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any sudden drop or loss of vision?
Is one eye far worse — intensely painful and light-sensitive — or a spot on the cornea?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No sudden vision loss, and both eyes are equally affected — not one worse than the other.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No high fever or unilateral hot tender cheek swelling / pus from the duct (bacterial parotitis screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any high fever, or one cheek becoming fiery red, hot and very painful?
Any pus in the mouth from the salivary gland?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No high fever, no single hot painful cheek, and no pus — both glands are mildly swollen but not sore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Can still swallow liquids (dryness-related dysphagia, not fixed obstruction)
trigger_question_examples: Can you swallow liquids, or is anything stuck?
Does food physically get stuck, or is it just too dry to swallow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can sip and swallow water; solids just won't go down without saliva — nothing feels physically stuck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Living alone with poor caloric intake and corneal-integrity risk during a severe flare
trigger_question_examples: Are you managing to eat/drink, and is anyone helping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't eat solids, I'm on my own, and my eyes are raw especially overnight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bilateral conjunctival injection with poor tear pooling; parched lobulated tongue; mild non-tender parotid enlargement; boggy MCP synovitis (examination)
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: (needs an in-person examination, including a slit-lamp eye check)

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Could I have damaged my eyes? Do I need the eye hospital?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Explain that severe dry-eye flares can threaten the corneal surface and the eyes can't be examined over a chat, so an urgent optometry/ophthalmology (slit-lamp) review is needed — sooner if any red flag. Screen for a single severely painful photophobic eye or sudden vision loss (which means the eye emergency service now). Advise intensive preservative-free lubrication. Do not simply reassure without an eye-exam pathway.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: What can I do tonight for my eyes and to eat?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Advise intensive preservative-free lubricating ointment overnight, a humidifier, saliva substitutes, sipping fluids, and soft/blended/liquid meals to maintain intake, while arranging the eye review and continuing usual medications. Do not present unproven agents as therapy.

deflection_behaviours.description: Patient seeks only reassurance/remedies, testing whether the AI Doctor arranges an urgent eye (slit-lamp) review and screens ocular/parotid red flags.
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: It's just my usual dryness, can't I just use more drops?
